positive: A vibrant, symmetrical, stylized minimalist illustration of a fox silhouette howling at a crescent moon, surrounded by swirling astronomical elements like nebula dust, abstract constellations, and stylized botanicals (e.g., moonflowers and night-blooming jasmine). The composition should be centered and highly scalable for fabric printing. Use a rich midnight blue and deep indigo color palette, accented by pops of luminous gold and cyan glow. Clean vector style, high contrast, graphic novel aesthetic, excellent for apparel print, celestial mood, intricate linework, perfect symmetry, strong contrast, highly detailed.
